PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-07-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Richard Collari for Timothy Hull.

The Court noted that this is an estate with an out of State Administrator and that at the last hearing it requested information as to what the liabilities of the estate are in order to determine an appropriate amount of bond. Mr. Collari stated that it has been a bit of a struggle, that two of the Brothers are in New York and that they got a bit of information from others that knew the Decedent, but not much more. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration (subject to review of the order). Bond is set at $20,000.00. Status on close of estate is set for July 7, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-10-2019 Continued To Jan-07-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Richard Collari for Petitioner.

The Court noted that there is an issue with bond and that it does not have a declaration regarding the anticipated liabilities and claims against the estate. Mr. Collari stated that his Client is in New York and is running into some difficulty obtaining information regarding debts and liabilities, that getting letters will make it easier, that he is prepared to provide a $20,000.00 bond and that his Client is aware that his Brother had no mortgage debt. The Court stated that it can continue the matter for Counsel to provide a declaration or grant the petition with bond set at $640,000.00. Mr. Collari stated that without letters it is unclear if there are any debts or liabilities and asked that the matter be continued. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to January 7, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to file a declaration regarding an appropriate amount of bond.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Siu. Not reported.
